title: RF-Benchmark-Hub
description: Reproducible benchmarks and a leaderboard for downstream machine-learning tasks on terrestrial RF signals (automatic modulation classification, specific emitter identification / RF fingerprinting, SNR estimation, interference identification, WiFi protocol/technology identification), comparing specialized baselines against fine-tuned foundation models under a common, canonical protocol. Datasets are never redistributed; only deterministic split indices and checksums are versioned.
